description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with a rich walnut finish and a distinctive wavy front panel design. The cabinet stands on four slender, black tapered legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The front features two main sections, each with a series of horizontal grooves that create a textured, sculptural effect. The back and sides are smooth and flat, with the back panel including a small rectangular cutout, likely for cable management. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, high-quality piece designed for both storage and visual appeal in urban interiors.
description: A modern walnut-finished cabinet with wavy grooved front panels and black tapered legs, offering both storage and a stylish sculptural look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wavy grooved panels and two main storage sections, supported by black tapered legs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the smooth wooden side panel and the depth of the cabinet, with the wavy front edge visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a flat wooden panel with a small rectangular cutout, likely for cable management.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the smooth side and the edge of the wavy front design.
